sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45276" key="eu)tei/xhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐτείχ-ητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (τεῖχος᾽</foreign> <sense id="n45276.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐτείχεος, Φρυγίη</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg005.perseus-grc1:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">112</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
